pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 7: TEST_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/src/test/java/com/payment/PaymentServiceTest.java"; verifier.py expects this file to be created by the task

software_claims.source: Maven Central Repository confirms JUnit Jupiter 5.x versions exist (5.14.3 latest in 5.x line), and JUnit 6.0.3 is current latest
Maven Central Repository confirms Mockito 5.x versions exist (5.2.0, 5.3.1, 5.4.0, 5.21.0, 5.22.0) with 5.22.0 being latest

privileged_info_summary: The task is to implement unit tests for a PaymentService class using JUnit 5 and Mockito. The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/payment-system. The main service class is at src/main/java/com/payment/PaymentService.java (relative to project root), the test class should be created at src/test/java/com/payment/PaymentServiceTest.java, and dependencies are declared in pom.xml. The PaymentService class has two dependencies injected via constructor: CreditCardProcessor (interface) and TransactionRepository (interface). The agent must add junit-jupiter (v5.x) and mockito-core (v5.x) dependencies to pom.xml, create the test class with proper mocking of the two dependencies, and implement test cases covering three scenarios: successful charge (returns true, saves SUCCESS transaction), declined charge (returns false, saves DECLINED transaction), and network exception (returns false, saves ERROR transaction). The verifier uses mutation testing to validate that the test cases catch three specific mutations: removing repository.save() calls, ignoring the processor.charge() result, and using incorrect transaction status values.
